text: Stepping from the quiet sterility of the glass-walled conference room into this vibrant R+D exhibit, I am struck by a curious blend of anticipation and reflection. The first space felt empty, almost suspended in possibility—a void waiting for ideas or conversation. Here, surrounded by words, screens, and the energetic pulse of color, I sense the vitality of inquiry and progress. Questions about our place in a world shaped by research and development rise within me. I feel almost electric with the possibility of discovering how humans might connect and co-exist with intelligence beyond our own understanding.
